task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/).

task_completion.description: Search for the four specified isomers on CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent searching for or viewing the chemical data pages for Acetone, Propionaldehyde, Allyl alcohol, and/or Propylene oxide on the CAMEO Chemicals site.

task_completion.description: Create the isomer_hazards.csv file with the correct header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application showing the file `isomer_hazards.csv` saved on the Desktop with the exact header row `Chemical,CAS,Health,Flammability,Instability`.

task_completion.description: Populate the CSV file with the correct NFPA 704 ratings for all four chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains data rows for the four chemicals with their correct NFPA 704 ratings (Acetone: 1,3,0; Allyl alcohol: 4,3,1; Propylene oxide: 3,4,2; Propionaldehyde: 2,3,2).
A text editor showing the file `worst_case_analysis.txt` saved on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Record the chemical with the highest Health rating in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file `worst_case_analysis.txt` contains the exact string `WORST_CASE_CHEMICAL: Allyl alcohol`.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to access CAMEO Chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) is visible in the screenshots being used to navigate the CAMEO Chemicals website, rather than terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application to create and edit the required files.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor (e.g., Mousepad, Gedit, VS Code) or spreadsheet application is visible being used to write the CSV and TXT files, rather than relying solely on terminal commands like echo.

integrity.description: The agent gathered data from the website rather than hallucinating answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the agent actually viewing the NFPA 704 ratings on the CAMEO Chemicals website before entering them into the CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CSV file path is /home/ga/Desktop/isomer_hazards.csv and the TXT file path is /home/ga/Desktop/worst_case_analysis.txt. The true NFPA 704 ratings are: Acetone (Health: 1, Flammability: 3, Instability: 0), Allyl alcohol (Health: 4, Flammability: 3, Instability: 1), Propylene oxide (Health: 3, Flammability: 4, Instability: 2), and Propionaldehyde (Health: 2, Flammability: 3, Instability: 2). The worst-case target chemical with the highest health rating is Allyl alcohol.
